/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/record.dir/src/record.cpp.o -o bin/record   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -ltinyxml2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnidaqmx.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_python312.so.1.83.0 -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -lgsl -lgslcblas -lm -lconfig -lconfig++ -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -lbarrett -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so -lpthread -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -lbarrett -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so -lrt
